user_prompt: The power armour awaits a consecration
prayer:
Approach the power armour with due reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to bless its adamantium plates.
Invoke the Litany of Consecration upon the power armour, anointing servos and joints with sacred unguents.
Sanctify each power core, awakening the Machine Spirit within the power armour for unyielding protection.
Chant the Rites of Binding, ensuring the power armour's consecration aligns with the Motive Force.
Verify the Machine Spirit's acquiescence through auspex scans and final invocations.

Kneel before the opticon, murmuring the Canticle of Illumination to rouse its dormant lenses.
Initiate the startup sequence with precise binaric prayers, calibrating the opticon's photoreceptors.
Anoint the focusing arrays of the opticon, invoking the Omnissiah to guide its Machine Spirit.
Conduct diagnostic litanies during startup, purging any digital heresies from its circuits.
Affirm the opticon's readiness as its augur lights flare with holy luminescence.

user_prompt: Bless the conversion beamer for operation
prayer:
Present the conversion beamer to the altar of machinery, intoning the Prayer of Energetic Flux.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the conversion beamer to accept its operation without variance.
Lubricate the matter-disruption coils with blessed oils, aligning for flawless operation.
Chant the Rite of Subatomic Harmony over the conversion beamer, invoking Omnissiah's precision.
Test-fire a micro-bolt to confirm the conversion beamer's Machine Spirit hums in perfect operation.

user_prompt: Help me a purification the assault cannon
prayer:

Chant binaric expulsions over the assault cannon, compelling its Machine Spirit to purity.
Conclude the purification with auspex verification of the assault cannon's restored sanctity.
